privileged_info_summary: This task operates on Odoo 17 Quality Module with synthetic data. Eight quality alerts exist in the New stage: Paint Discoloration on Metal Panels, Incorrect Spacing Between Components, Material Hardness Below Specification, Critical Weld Failure on Frame, Loose Hardware on Shelf Unit, Desk Laminate Delamination, Chair Armrest Cracking, and Screen Frame Scratch on Delivery. Three alerts are safety-critical (containing 'Weld', 'Hardware', or 'Cracking' keywords): Critical Weld Failure on Frame, Loose Hardware on Shelf Unit, and Chair Armrest Cracking. All New-stage alerts are reset to Normal (0) priority by setup_task.sh before the task begins. The result file is written to /tmp/quality_team_audit_setup_result.json. The target team name is 'ISO Surveillance Response Team'. Priority values: 0=Normal, 1=High, 2=Urgent, 3=Blocker. Odoo instance runs at http://localhost:8069 with database 'odoo_quality' and credentials admin/admin.
